description: Create a new SLD style named 'scaled_cities' in the 'ne' workspace for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer. The style must render a red circle point marker at all scales and display the 'name' label using a black SansSerif font with a white halo only when the scale denominator is less than 20,000,000. Assign 'scaled_cities' as the default style for the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer.
